title: Creating a Linked List
scenario: Write a Python class that implements a singly linked list, including methods for inserting nodes at the beginning and end of the list, deleting a node by value, and traversing the list. The class should include clear documentation and adhere to standard Python conventions. The output should be a code snippet.
constraints: Must implement a singly linked list
Must include methods for inserting nodes at the beginning and end of the list

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the Python code snippet is syntactically correct, following standard Python conventions.
Check whether the generated code meets the specified constraints (singly linked list implementation and method presence).
Evaluate the correctness of the generated code, ensuring it accurately performs insertion, deletion, and traversal operations on the linked list.
Assess the code's readability and maintainability, considering comment quality, variable naming, and overall structure.
